message:
feat(tests): policy model test suite + logging v2 with trace/span correlation

New test file (tests/capability_policy_model.rs):
- Comprehensive coverage for the Capability enum (parsing, roundtrips,
  dangerous classification, Display impl)
- PolicyProfile preset validation (Safe/Standard/Permissive)
- Per-extension override tests with the full 5-layer precedence chain
- Edge cases: empty capabilities, unknown tokens, case sensitivity

Updated existing tests:
- capability_denial_matrix.rs and capability_prompt.rs: added
  ..Default::default() to ExtensionPolicy literals to accommodate the
  new per_extension field without breaking existing assertions

Test logging infrastructure (tests/common/logging.rs):
- Bumped schema to pi.test.log.v2 with trace_id and span_id fields
  for correlating logs from the same test run
- New SpanGuard RAII type: begin_span()/end_span() with automatic
  duration logging on drop and nested span support via parent_span_id
- AtomicU64 span ID generator for lock-free unique IDs
- LogEntry extended with span_id and parent_span_id fields
- Additional redaction placeholders for trace and span IDs

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
